name: lemma-records-page
title: Lemma Records Page
description: A practical records workspace with table picker, filters, bulk actions, record picker, records table, details, form, and forward plus reverse relations.

files.content:
"use client" import * as React from "react" import type { LemmaClient } from "lemma-sdk" import { useForeignKeyOptions } from "lemma-sdk/react" import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue, } from "@/components/ui/select" import { cn } from "@/lib/utils" const EMPTY_VALUE = "__lemma_empty__" export interface LemmaForeignKeySelectProps extends React.HTMLAttributes { client: LemmaClient podId?: string tableName: string columnName: string value?: string | null onValueChange?: (value: string) => void placeholder?: string disabled?: boolean allowEmpty?: boolean emptyLabel?: string labelField?: string labelFields?: string[] limit?: number search?: string } export const LemmaForeignKeySelect = React.forwardRef( ({ client, podId, tableName, columnName, value, onValueChange, placeholder = "Select an option", disabled, allowEmpty = true, emptyLabel = "None", labelField, labelFields, limit, search, className, ...props }, ref) => { const { options, isLoading, error } = useForeignKeyOptions({ client, podId, tableName, columnName, labelField, labelFields, limit, search, }) const resolvedValue = value && value.length > 0 ? value : EMPTY_VALUE const isDisabled = disabled || isLoading || !!error return (
) }) LemmaForeignKeySelect.displayName = "LemmaForeignKeySelect"
